description: Harness-neutral discovery catalog for Video Search and Summarization workflow skills. Paths are relative to the repository root.

skills.name: vss-up
skills.description: Deploy, dry-run, stop, or clean the VSS stack in summary, search, dual, or unified mode using setup.sh.

skills.name: vss-doctor
skills.description: Diagnose a running or failing VSS deployment through health endpoints, feature/config probes, Docker Compose state, and logs.

skills.name: vss-build
skills.description: Build and optionally push VSS Docker images from source using build.sh.

skills.name: vss-summarize
skills.description: Run and inspect VSS video summarization through the Pipeline Manager summary API.

skills.name: vss-search
skills.description: Upload, index, and search videos with natural language through the Pipeline Manager search API.
